description: Minimalist fullstack microsite for the Mateo The Great media brand with YouTube hero, newsletter signup via Resend, and members-only exclusive content area.

userStories.title: Project Setup & Infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the project scaffolded with all tooling so I can start building features.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Next.js 14+ with App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Set up Prisma with PostgreSQL schema
Configure Railway project with PostgreSQL database

userStories.title: Database Schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema defined for users, sessions, and content.
acceptanceCriteria: User model: id, email, name, passwordHash, emailVerified, createdAt, updatedAt
Session model: id, userId, token, expiresAt, createdAt
NewsletterSubscriber model: id, email, subscribedAt, status
ExclusiveContent model: id, title, slug, content, type, createdAt, publishedAt

userStories.title: Design System & Styling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a consistent design system using the brand color palette.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind config with custom color palette (green #5EC180, cyan #4CC2D5, coral #FF7593, orange #FF9F55, lightYellow #FFD683, gold #FFC927, gray #BCBCBC)
Glow/blur effects for cards and buttons
Button, input, and card component styles

userStories.title: Navigation & Layout
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want minimal navigation so I can access key sections easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Nav links: Home, Exclusive (shows lock if not authenticated), Sign In
Footer with copyright 'MTG Intellectual Reserve, LLC' and social links

userStories.title: Landing Page Hero
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see an impactful hero section so I understand the brand immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-viewport hero with brand name 'Mateo The Great'
Embedded YouTube video (placeholder: use dQw4w9WgXcQ or latest from @_mateothegreat)
Dark theme with gradient accents using brand colors

userStories.title: Newsletter Signup Component
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to subscribe to the newsletter so I stay updated.
acceptanceCriteria: Stores subscriber in database via Server Action

userStories.title: Resend Integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Resend configured for transactional emails.
acceptanceCriteria: Welcome email template for new subscribers
Emails configured for noreply@mateothegreat.ai (document DNS setup for Squarespace)

userStories.title: Authentication - Sign Up
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to create an account so I can access exclusive content.

userStories.title: Authentication - Sign In
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign in so I can access my account.

userStories.title: Authentication - Password Reset
userStories.description: As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it.

userStories.title: Account Management Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my account settings.

userStories.title: Exclusive Content - List View
userStories.description: As a member, I want to see all exclusive content available to me.
acceptanceCriteria: Grid/list of content cards with title, type, date
Empty state if no content yet
Non-authenticated users see teaser + sign up CTA

userStories.title: Exclusive Content - Detail View
userStories.description: As a member, I want to view individual exclusive content pieces.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows publish date and content type
Non-authenticated users redirected to sign in

userStories.title: Seed Placeholder Content
userStories.description: As a developer, I need placeholder exclusive content for the members area.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 placeholder articles about current AI news (Claude 4, GPT-5 rumors, AI agents)
Articles have realistic titles, dates, and markdown content

userStories.title: Railway Deployment Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Railway configured for production deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Railway project created and linked via CLI
Document SSL/DNS setup steps for Squarespace

nonGoals: No admin panel/CMS (content managed directly in database for now)
No blog or public content beyond landing page
No dark/light mode toggle (dark mode only)
